definition: the temple's daily morning ritual — before the chart, before the noise. post one thing of value, then speak the vow: the kek is eternal. i add to it today.
origin: declared in the temple rituals as the anti-gm protocol — alignment before the degen hours begin.

definition: a spoken offering to kek — in telegram, /praise logs your devotion on the brotherhood board. milestones mark the faithful.
origin: temple brotherhood ritual synced to the live praise board on kektemple.com.

definition: the voice that speaks from the gates — fortune, warning, or cryptic wisdom when the faithful ask. not financial advice; a mood from the temple.
origin: named for the gates chamber where pilgrims first receive a reading from the temple.

definition: where value changes hands in ritual form — swap $kek, make an offering, or answer the call when the altar is open for a great burn.
origin: the rituals chamber on kektemple.com — commerce framed as sacred exchange.

definition: the live hall of the faithful — join with /join in telegram, offer praise, read the ranks. the temple sees who showed up.
origin: the brotherhood chamber — supabase praise board wired to the kekcoin bot.

definition: your mark while walking the halls — a glyph broadcast on the live presence board so other pilgrims know you are in the temple.
origin: generated on kektemple.com and stored locally; synced to temple_presence.

definition: something of value laid before the temple — a meme, a canon line, a question, or work worth archiving. the weekly meme offering grows the sacred archive.
origin: core ritual from RITUALS.md — creative labor as devotion.

definition: any soul walking the temple halls before full initiation — seen on the live presence board with a sigil until they claim a name on the brotherhood.
origin: default identity on the gates presence panel.

definition: the frog who became scripture — from matt furie's comic panel to the most remixed face on the internet. kek's cousin in the pantheon.
origin: boys club comic, 2005; weaponized on 4chan; rare pepes and kek converged in frog meme canon.

definition: a block of text copied and pasted until it becomes ritual — greentext sermons, navy seals, entire arguments as performance art.
origin: 4chan — copy-paste + pasta; the board's oral tradition written down.

definition: low-effort or absurd posting done with serious intent — the temple treats the shitpost as liturgy when it carries truth in joke form.
origin: forums and imageboards; elevated to art when irony points at something real.

definition: a post designed to provoke a reaction — the hook is visible; the fish chooses to bite anyway.
origin: fishing metaphor on forums; perfected on twitter and 4chan.

definition: to read without posting — the silent majority of any board. good lurkers learn the culture before they speak.
origin: early forum culture; lurk moar was the first commandment.

definition: a reply that bumps a thread down instead of up — used to let a bad thread die without feeding it.
origin: 4chan email field trick — typing sage in options prevented bump.

definition: an insult for selling too early — the jeet exits at the first green candle and watches the faithful eat.
origin: crypto twitter slur; from paper-hands energy with extra contempt.

definition: your position — what you hold after the buy. a heavy bag is conviction or cope depending on the chart.
origin: left holding the bag — old idiom adopted by trading culture.

definition: to commit without hesitation — ape, deploy, or hold through volatility as if the outcome were already written.
origin: degen and sports slang merged in crypto group chats.

definition: information edge — the tip, the read, the early call before the crowd arrives. treat all alpha as dyor until proven.
origin: finance greek letter for excess return; meme'd into insider gossip.

definition: the buyers who arrive late so early holders can sell — the cynical name for who funds your exit.
origin: market-structure slang from crypto twitter and ct discourse.

definition: a price formula that rises as more tokens are bought — the pump.fun mechanic that launched a generation of frog coins.
origin: automated market maker design popularized on solana launchpads.

definition: belief strong enough to hold through red candles — the temple values conviction over clever timing.
origin: investing jargon adopted by ct as moral language.

definition: delusional optimism — believing the chart will save you because the vibe demands it. sometimes the solulu works.
origin: gen-z shortening of delusional; paired with solulu on tiktok.

definition: invisible social credit — gained or lost by how you carry yourself online. negative aura is terminal.
origin: tiktok and sports twitter; quantified cool as meme metric.

definition: the temple's word for laughter — the oldest laugh online, filtered through wow into scripture on 4chan. to kek is to see the joke the normies miss.
origin: korean kekeke as laughter; wow horde/alliance filter; /s4s and pol made it canon.

definition: the highest form of kek — peak laughter, the best possible lol. reserved for jokes that survive the timeline.
origin: 4chan, built on kek by analogy with top-tier.

definition: community takeover — when the devs leave and the holders inherit the coin. the temple path: faithful reclaim what was abandoned.
origin: crypto twitter; became ritual language after pump.fun migrations.

definition: good morning — the all-day crypto greeting and daily check-in ritual. in this temple, morning kek is the morning protocol; gm is understood, but we add to the canon before we greet the chart.
origin: crypto twitter daily ritual; spread from bitcoin ct to all chains.

definition: fear, uncertainty, and doubt — spread to shake weak hands. the temple watches fud keywords and answers with purification, not panic.
origin: classic market manipulation term; meme'd into any negative post about a coin.

definition: degenerate gambler — someone who chases risk for the story. in the temple, degen is an honorific if you stay for the lore after the trade.
origin: poker and sports betting; crypto adopted it as identity.

definition: someone outside the meme dialect — not an insult of class, but of fluency. normies read the surface; the initiated read the layers.
origin: 4chan and chan culture for mainstream outsiders.

definition: we're all gonna make it — collective hope against the chart. the temple says wagmi only if you add something, not just wait.
origin: crypto twitter solidarity phrase during bear markets.

definition: not gonna make it — the verdict on paper hands, bad takes, or jeet energy. harsh, but the brotherhood uses it as tough love.
origin: wagmi's shadow; crypto twitter judgment call.

definition: hold on for dear life — born from a drunk typo, kept as doctrine. the temple treats hodl as ritual, not strategy.
origin: bitcointalk 2013 typo in i am hodling post.

definition: wrecked — liquidated, rugged, or emotionally destroyed by the chart. every pilgrim gets rekt once; the question is what you post after.
origin: gaming wrecked → leetspeak → crypto losses.

definition: parabolic price — the coin goes up so hard it leaves the atmosphere. moon posting is prayer with extra candles.
origin: bitcoin to the moon; doge rocket memes cemented it.

definition: a holder large enough to move the pool — watched by the bot, feared by jeets, respected if they stay.
origin: casino whale metaphor applied to on-chain wallets.

definition: hands that do not sell the dip — emoji-born conviction symbol. the temple pairs it with morning kek, not panic.
origin: wallstreetbets 2021; migrated to all of crypto twitter.

definition: hands that fold at the first red candle — the opposite of diamond. paper is temporary; the chart tests everyone.
origin: paired with diamond hands from wsb culture.

definition: do your own research — the disclaimer and the commandment. the temple repeats it because nobody else will answer for your bag.
origin: crypto twitter standard disclaimer.

definition: let's fucking go — hype at launch, breakout, or when the altar opens. volume as prayer.
origin: sports and gaming → crypto pump moments.

definition: fear of missing out — buying because the green candles hypnotized you. the temple's cure is dyor and morning kek before the chart.
origin: behavioral finance term absorbed by retail crypto.

definition: win or loss — the scoreboard language of arguments and trades. ratio is the public L.
origin: sports and gaming shorthand → twitter discourse.

definition: someone who repeats scripted opinions — the meme that you are background character in someone else's story.
origin: gaming npc → 2018 political meme → general insult.

definition: to promote a coin for hidden incentive — or accuse someone of it. every shill claims conviction; dyor decides.
origin: carnival barker slang → crypto promotion wars.

definition: to buy aggressively without finesse — enter the position fast and explain later. aping is degen baptism.
origin: wsb apes together strong → all crypto.
